ns1:SendMessage.ns1:request: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <TransferMessage xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" е открит И.ИВАНОВ</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails><ActionRegDetails ВРЪЧЕНИ НА ДЛЪЖНИКА НЕ Е ОТКРИТ ЗАЛЕПЕНО С-Е И.ИВАНОВ</Description><Notes/></ActionRegDetails></ActionReg></TransferData></Body></TransferMessage>
